api_key.description: Brevo API key. Sent as the api-key header; never logged.

base_url.description: Brevo API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only contacts/campaigns modified at or after this time are read (sent as modifiedSince).

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000) for paginated endpoints.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
